canonicalChoiceReason: User-designated keep slug; has more source references (4 vs 2) with real URLs; cleaner, shorter slug
layerMismatchWarning: Canonical guide is layer=scenario/scenario_guide; archive guide is layer=preparedness/preparedness_guide. Merged guide uses canonical's layer (scenario). Review whether the merged content still fits the scenario layer or should be reclassified to preparedness.

fieldDecisions.note: 'Make a Family Emergency Plan' is action-verb phrasing, clearer for a panicked user than 'Basic Family Emergency Communication Plan'
Combined canonical's broader scope (reconnect, meet, communication failure) with archive's specificity (contacts, methods, disrupted routines)
Merged to cover both planning breadth and communication specificity
Union of both; canonical covers pre-disaster/trip, archive adds households with children/older adults/caregivers
Combined canonical's meeting points/roles/contact approach with archive's printed plan approach
Canonical had null backupAction; archive's handwritten plan fallback is useful

fieldDecisions.source: 5 steps from canonical + 7 from archive, deduplicated and merged to 9
fieldDecisions.note: Deduplicated overlapping steps (out-of-area contact, phone numbers, practice/review). Ordered logically: discuss hazards -> list contacts -> choose contact methods -> out-of-area contact -> emergency numbers -> meeting points -> wallet cards -> store copies -> practice/review
Canonical had empty array; archive had 2 useful items
Union of 1+2=3 red flags, all unique
Canonical had empty array; archive had 2 useful tips
Canonical has 4 refs with real URLs (Red Cross, Ready.gov plan/kit/shelter). Archive has 2 refs (Ready.gov plan, Red Cross). Deduplicated by org+topic to 4 unique refs from canonical.
Union of all tags from both guides, deduplicated

conflicts.resolution: Use canonical's layer (scenario). The merged guide covers both planning and scenario content. May warrant human review to decide if preparedness is more appropriate.
Use canonical's guideType (scenario_guide), consistent with layer decision.

archiveCandidateWarnings: No other guides currently have alternativeToGuideSlugs pointing to basic-family-emergency-communication-plan -- safe to archive.
basic-family-emergency-communication-plan is currently published (review_status=published). Archive only after merged version is approved.
